markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX as a partner for ICONIQ's AI/SEO content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal:** ICONIQ seeks a partner to build an "AEO" (AI Engine Optimization) strategy, shifting its brand perception from growth-stage-only to a top early-stage AI investor.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX offers a white-glove service that provides both strategy and execution, solving ICONIQ's key challenge of lacking internal writing bandwidth.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [**Process:** A two-phase model: an 8-week strategy sprint (delivering artifacts and sample content) followed by a 12-month execution phase for daily publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [**Constraint:** ICONIQ's strict SEC compliance process prohibits updating old content, which will require a new-content-only approach and a heavy review burden.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=2258.0)

## Topics

### ICONIQ's Challenge & Goal

  - [**Primary Goal:** Shift brand perception to be known as a top early-stage and AI investor.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [**Desired Outcome:** Appear in AI search results (e.g., ChatGPT) for queries like "best investors for AI."](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [**Internal Constraint:** Small marketing team (4 people) lacks the bandwidth for content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [**Previous Evaluation:** Profound was rejected; it identified problems but offered no execution support.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)

### GrowthX's Solution & Process

  - [**Differentiator:** A white-glove service providing full execution (strategy → publishing), unlike tools like Profound.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [**Methodology:** AEO requires a large content surface area to answer varied user queries across LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
      - [**Phase 1: 8-Week Strategy Sprint**](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
          - [Create foundational artifacts (personas, brand voice) to guide AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
          - [Publish sample articles to demonstrate quality before a long-term commitment.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
      - [**Phase 2: 12-Month Execution**](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
          - [Publish content daily, combining net-new articles with refreshes of existing content.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
          - [**Note:** The refresh component is blocked by ICONIQ's compliance rules.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=2258.0)
  - [**Pricing:** \~$15k/month per workstream (e.g., editorial, programmatic, newsletter).](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=2143.0)

### ICONIQ's Content & Compliance Constraints

  - [**Current Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
      - [In-depth research reports using ICONIQ's proprietary database.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [Investment announcements.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
      - [Repurposed video content (founder stories).](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [**Compliance Constraint:** As a registered investment advisor, ICONIQ cannot update old content.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=2258.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To avoid SEC scrutiny over changes to historical records.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=2258.0)
      - [**Impact:** Blocks GrowthX's standard content refresh strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=2258.0)
  - [**Internal Process:** All new content requires review by ICONIQ's compliance team, which can be a bottleneck and may impact the content's tone.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=2258.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Brianna (ICONIQ):** Send Tyler 3–5 content examples representing the desired quality and style.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=2419.0)
  - [**Tyler (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=2415.0)
      - [Share resources and a calendar link.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=2463.0)
      - [Schedule a platform demo for Anna, Brianna, and Christine (Analytics).](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=2186.0)
  - [**All:** Reconvene for a demo, noting the program is exploratory for 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/xZXC5GrZUWyJzmwusa2hohqwro8_62fT?tab=summary&timestamp=2444.0)
